narrative:
Howland Twp Only township has 12,535 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.1 percentage points.
